risks.title: Repeated changes to security file
risks.evidence: Four events report modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx within 17 seconds (2026-04-27 19:02:22-19:02:39), with 50% marked as duplicates
risks.recommendedAction: Verify changes are intentional; review diff to ensure no unintended modifications or injection attempts

risks.title: Event deduplication system malfunction
risks.evidence: Multiple near-identical events (same timestamp ±1ms) reaching the observer, indicating potential system-level duplicate handling issues
risks.recommendedAction: Audit event pipeline; implement timestamp-based deduplication or event fingerprinting to prevent duplicate processing

opportunities.title: Active security module enhancement
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx is being actively developed with recent commits; high relevance events (0.85-0.95) indicate intentional changes
opportunities.suggestedAction: Run security audit and unit tests to validate changes; consider adding security-specific CI/CD gates for this file

taskCandidates.title: Review and test Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Inspect the diff of Security.tsx changes from the last 20 seconds; run existing security tests to validate no regressions
taskCandidates.rationale: Security files require explicit verification; high-relevance events warrant immediate review

taskCandidates.title: Implement event deduplication in monitoring
taskCandidates.description: Add fingerprinting or timestamp-based deduplication to prevent duplicate code-observer events within 2-second windows
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal-to-noise ratio and can mask critical issues

recommendations.title: Establish baseline for security file modifications
recommendations.rationale: Multiple rapid changes to security-critical code should trigger elevated alerting; current events lack context on whether this is normal development
recommendations.action: Define review SLA for security file commits; route to security team; add pre-commit validation

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review and test Security.tsx changes
